title: Rochefort Mills
description: Another sin committed against our beautiful machines. Adds a "Flopster Drive" that accepts "Flopster Disks"
body:
This mod endows you with the FLOPSTER Drive, a miraculous technology that allows one to use the Siltware contained within FLOPSTER Disks. Unfortunately for you, FLOPSTER Discs are higher-dimensional objects -- You can't touch them directly, or even load them from your game folder! How can you use such an awful machine when you don't even know how to load the discs in? 

For what its worth, the mysterious masked figure who sold you the device down at the old silt mill also [furnished you with some sick "warez"](https://github.com/HamaIndustries/Rochefort-Mills/blob/main/warez/FOXTROT.jpg?raw=true).

WARNING: Do not accept FLOPSTER Disks from sources you do not trust completely. Remember that all mods are arbitrary code.

-----

FLOPSTER Drive texture kindly provided by the talented [WorldWidePixel](https://worldwidepixel.ca/).
